sourceAttribution: Hole geometry (tees, greens), par and stroke index derived from OpenStreetMap golf_course relation 8318198 (Setbergsvöllur). Map data © OpenStreetMap contributors, licensed under ODbL (https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright).
Par sums to 72, consistent with public course metadata (e.g. Rástímar / Golf Iceland).
Green front/back edges are NOT in OSM and must be captured in the app's Survey mode or measured in the field.
No data was taken from any proprietary commercial golf-GPS app or database.
Hazards (bunkers, water) derived from OpenStreetMap and assigned to the nearest hole(s) by playing line. Map data © OpenStreetMap contributors, ODbL.
Hole feature polygons (greens, fairways, bunkers, water, tees) from OpenStreetMap, ODbL. Elevation from Copernicus EU-DEM (25 m) via OpenTopoData.
Hole centerlines + feature polygons (greens, fairways, bunkers, water, tees) from OpenStreetMap, ODbL. Elevation from Copernicus EU-DEM (25 m) via OpenTopoData.
Par and stroke index verified against the official scorecard on Rástímar (rastimar.golf.is).
Course Rating 70.8 and Slope 130 are the official men's back-tee (56) ratings from the scorecard (Rástímar), used for WHS course handicap.
notes: Setbergsvöllur is physically 9 holes played as 18 from different tees: hole N and hole N+9 share the same physical green (greenId) but have their own tee, par and stroke index. Par and stroke index verified against the official scorecard (Rástímar); hole 9 is SI 10 (OSM had mistagged it SI 3).

holes.notes: Same green as hole 8 but par 4 from a different tee.
